sentiment.summary: Iran conflict sends oil past $100, crushing equities as inflation fears return and VIX spikes to 31.

insights.text: Oil above $100 ignites a market fear storm. Iran war escalation sent WTI up 13% to $103, Strait of Hormuz blockage threatening global supply. S&P -1.3%, VIX at 31.84. BTC the only green asset. Fed rate-cut hopes fading as inflation risk resurfaces hard.

BTC steady while markets panic — acting as a safe haven. Rose 1% to $67,500 as equities sold off hard. Still 8% below your $73,135 cost basis. Fear & Greed Index at 8 — extreme fear. ETF inflows $568M this week. Hold $65K support level key.

RKLB at $69.70 — 12% above your $62.04 basis, outperforming today. Beat Q4/FY25 estimates with 38% revenue growth and expanding margins. Neutron delayed to Q4 2026 on tank rupture but market shrugged. Space sector holding up well in a brutal tape.

S&P 500 inclusion March 23 forces massive passive buying wave. At $109.64, just below your $114.33 basis. EchoStar XXV launching tonight via Falcon 9. AT&T/SpaceX spectrum deals cleared all debt risk. Catalysts stacking — this dip is a gift before index inclusion.

TE near flat at $6.81 vs. $6.73 basis — holding in ugly market. Section 45X tax credit Treasury guidance is key tailwind. $160M PTC sale closed, G2_Austin 2.1GW solar fab under construction. Domestic solar story intact. Oil surge may boost clean energy narrative.

STX at $335 — bleeding 25% below your $448.98 basis. Down 5% today, 8.5% on the week. Q2 revenue $2.83B beat estimates but macro is crushing growth. AI storage demand thesis intact — HAMR tech and hyperscaler demand are real. Patience needed. No bottom yet.

TSAT at $30.84 — 7.5% below your $33.33 basis, drifting lower. Earnings March 26, EPS est. -$1.05. Canadian Arctic military satellite deal is a long-term positive. Lightspeed LEO construction ongoing. No near-term catalyst. Hold position, watch earnings.

BBAI at $4.25 — a brutal -53% from your $9.02 basis. Revenue fell 37.5% but debt slashed 90%, 2026 guide $135-165M signals recovery. Stockholder meeting March 18. Speculative AI play with no near-term floor. High conviction required to hold this position.

NBIS at $89 — down 32% from $131.12 basis despite explosive growth. Q4 revenue +547% y/y, 2026 guide $4B. Missouri AI campus approved. Compass Point Buy, $150 target. Macro selling appears overdone vs. fundamentals. Hold the AI infrastructure thesis.

OKLO at $58 — -53% from your $125 basis, no floor found yet. Down 60% from ATH $193. Meta 1.2GW Ohio campus deal and DOE reactor pilot are transformational but years away from revenue. Nuclear thesis intact, timeline brutal. Do not average down yet.

NVTS at $8.23 — -18% below your $10 basis on ugly fundamentals. Q4 revenue fell 59% y/y, Q1 guide just $8-8.5M. New all-GaN 10kW platform debuts at APEC March 22-26 — watch for catalyst. GaN/EV power story is real but execution badly lagging.
